changes: Royal Authority: Potency increased from 180 to 200. Combo potency increased from 440 to 460.
Holy Spirit: Potency increased from 370 to 400. Potency while under Divine Might increased from 470 to 500.
Requiescat potency increased from 670 to 700.
Atonement: Potency increased from 440 to 460.
Supplication: Potency increased from 460 to 500.
Sepulchre: Potency increased from 480 to 540.
Confiteor: Potency increased from 440 to 500. Requiescat potency increased from 940 to 1,000.
Blade of Faith: Potency increased from 240 to 260. Requiescat potency increased from 740 to 760.
Blade of Truth: Potency increased from 340 to 380. Requiescat potency increased from 840 to 880.
Blade of Valor: Potency increased from 440 to 500. Requiescat potency increased from 940 to 1,000.
Hard Slash: Potency increased from 260 to 300.
Syphon Strike: Potency increased from 220 to 240. Combo potency increased from 360 to 380.
Souleater: Potency increased from 240 to 260. Combo potency increased from 460 to 480.
Shadowstride: Time between activation and character movement reduced.
Carve and Split: Potency upon learning Melee Mastery II changed from 510 to 540.
Disesteem: Potency increased from 800 to 1,000.
Trajectory: Time between activation and character movement reduced.
Phantom Rush: Potency upon learning Melee Mastery II changed from 1,400 to 1,500.
Wind's Reply: Potency increased from 800 to 900.
Fire's Reply: Potency increased from 1,100 to 1,200.
Winged Glide: Time between activation and character movement reduced.
Stardiver: Potency upon learning Melee Mastery changed from 620 to 720.
Starcross: Potency increased from 700 to 900.
Gust Slash: Potency increased from 220 to 240. Combo potency increased from 380 to 400.
Forked Raiju: Potency increased from 640 to 700.
Fleeting Raiju: Potency increased from 640 to 700.
Zessho Meppo: Potency increased from 550 to 700.
Mesui potency increased from 700 to 850.
Tenri Jindo: Potency increased from 1,000 to 1,100.
Jinpu: Potency reduced from 160 to 140. Combo potency reduced from 320 to 300.
Shifu: Potency reduced from 160 to 140. Combo potency reduced from 320 to 300.
Gekko: Potency reduced from 180 to 160. Rear potency reduced from 230 to 210. Combo potency reduced from 390 to 370. Combo rear potency reduced from 440 to 420.
Kasha: Potency reduced from 180 to 160. Flank potency reduced from 230 to 210. Combo potency reduced from 390 to 370. Combo flank potency reduced from 440 to 420.
Yukikaze: Potency reduced from 180 to 160. Combo potency reduced from 360 to 340.
Meikyo Shisui: Additional effect 'Grants Tsubame-gaeshi' removed.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency reduced from 700 to 640.
Hissatsu: Senei: Potency reduced from 860 to 800.
Enhanced Iaijutsu: Added effect 'Also grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready after executing iaijutsu excluding Higanbana' with 30s duration.
Tsubame-gaeshi: Acquired at level 74 (previously 76).
Kaeshi: Goken: Acquired at level 74 (previously 76).
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Acquired at level 74 (previously 76). Potency reduced from 700 to 640.
Enhanced Meikyo Shisui: Effect 'Grants Tsubame-gaeshi Ready' removed.
Tengentsu: 'Restores HP when effect expires' changed to 'Gradually restores your HP and reduces damage taken by 10%'. Cure potency reduced from 500 to 200. Duration increased from 8 to 9 seconds.
Gyofu: Potency reduced from 240 to 230.
Zanshin: Potency reduced from 900 to 820.
Tendo Goken: Potency reduced from 420 to 410.
Tendo Kaeshi Goken: Potency reduced from 420 to 410.
Soul Slice: Potency upon learning Melee Mastery III increased from 460 to 520.
Perfectio: Potency increased from 1,200 to 1,300.
Steel Fangs: Honed Steel potency of 300 added. Additional effect 'Grants Honed Reavers' (60s) added. Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Steel.
Hunter's Sting: Potency increased from 260 to 300.

Dread Fangs: Name changed to Reaving Fangs. Potency increased from 140 to 200. Honed Reavers potency of 300 added. Additional effect 'Afflicts target with Noxious Gnash' changed to 'Grants Honed Steel' (60s). Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Reavers.
Swiftskin's Sting: Potency increased from 260 to 300.
Steel Maw: Honed Steel potency of 120 added. Additional effect 'Grants Honed Reavers' (60s) added. Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Steel.
Flanksting Strike: Potency increased from 300 to 340. Flank potency increased from 360 to 400. Hindsting Venom duration increased to 60s.
Flanksbane Fang: Potency increased from 300 to 340. Flank potency increased from 360 to 400. Hindsting Venom duration increased to 60s.
Hindsting Strike: Potency increased from 300 to 340. Rear potency increased from 360 to 400. Flanksbane Venom duration increased to 60s.
Hindsbane Fang: Potency increased from 300 to 340. Rear potency increased from 360 to 400. Flanksbane Venom duration increased to 60s.

Dread Maw: Name changed to Reaving Maw. Potency increased from 80 to 100. Honed Reavers potency of 120 added. Additional effect 'Afflicts target with Noxious Gnash' changed to 'Grants Honed Steel' (60s).
Hunter's Bite: Potency increased from 120 to 130.
Slither: Time between activation and character movement reduced.
Swiftskin's Bite: Potency increased from 120 to 130.
Jagged Maw: Grimskin's Venom duration increased to 60s.
Bloodied Maw: Grimhunter's Venom duration increased to 60s.
Death Rattle: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Dreadwinder: Name changed to Vicewinder. Potency increased from 450 to 500. Additional effect 'Afflicts target with Noxious Gnash' removed.
Hunter's Coil: Potency increased from 500 to 570. Flank potency increased from 550 to 620.
Swiftskin's Coil: Potency increased from 500 to 570. Rear potency increased from 550 to 620.
Pit of Dread: Name changed to Vicepit. Potency increased from 200 to 220. Additional effect 'Afflicts target with Noxious Gnash' removed.
Hunter's Den: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Swiftskin's Den: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Twinfang Bite: Potency increased from 100 to 120. Hunter's Venom potency increased from 150 to 170.
Twinblood Bite: Potency increased from 100 to 120. Swiftskin's Venom potency increased from 150 to 170.
Uncoiled Fury: Potency increased from 600 to 680.
Reawaken: Potency increased from 700 to 750.
First Generation: Potency increased from 400 to 480. Potency after Reawaken increased from 600 to 680.
Second Generation: Potency increased from 400 to 480. Potency after First Generation increased from 600 to 680.
Third Generation: Potency increased from 400 to 480. Potency after Second Generation increased from 600 to 680.
Fourth Generation: Potency increased from 400 to 480. Potency after Third Generation increased from 600 to 680.
Uncoiled Twinfang: Potency increased from 100 to 120. Poised for Twinfang potency increased from 150 to 170.
Uncoiled Twinblood: Potency increased from 100 to 120. Poised for Twinblood potency increased from 150 to 170.
Ouroboros: Potency increased from 1,050 to 1,150.
First Legacy: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Second Legacy: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Third Legacy: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Fourth Legacy: Potency increased from 250 to 280.
Full Metal Field: Potency increased from 700 to 900.
Fan Dance IV: Potency is now increased from 300 to 420 upon learning the trait Dynamic Dancer.
Thunder: Potency reduced from 120 to 100. Damage over time potency increased from 40 to 45.
Umbral Soul: Additional effect 'Halts the expiration of Umbral Ice' added. Now grants Umbral Ice III, 3 Umbral Hearts, and restores 10,000 MP while out of combat.
Thunder III: Potency reduced from 160 to 120. Damage over time potency increased from 45 to 50.
Flare: Reduced damage for remaining enemies changed from 40% to 30%.
Blizzard IV: Potency increased from 310 to 320.
Fire IV: Potency increased from 310 to 320.
Despair: Potency increased from 340 to 350.
High Thunder: Potency reduced from 200 to 150. Damage over time potency increased from 55 to 60.
Enhanced Enochian III: Magic damage increase changed from 23% to 25%.
Paradox: Potency increased from 500 to 520. Astral Fire/Fire Starter now require Astral Fire. Added Umbral Ice bonus: 'Requires no MP to cast and grants Umbral Ice' (15s).
Aspect Mastery V: Paradox marker can now be active after reaching Astral Fire III then swapping to opposite element.
Enhanced Enochian IV: Magic damage increase changed from 30% to 33%.
Necrotize: Potency increased from 420 to 440.
Umbral Impulse: Potency increased from 600 to 620.
Sunflare: Potency increased from 600 to 700.
Contre Sixte: Potency increased from 400 to 420.
Manafication: Magicked Swordplay duration increased from 15 to 30s.
Enchanted Reprise: Potency increased from 380 to 420.
Verthunder III: Potency increased from 420 to 440.
Veraero III: Potency increased from 420 to 440.
Dia: Potency increased from 70 to 75. Damage over time potency increased from 70 to 75.
Play I / Play II / Play III: Shared recast time removed.

new_content.name: AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage)
new_content.description: A raid dungeon consisting of four encounters (M1–M4) available via the Raid Finder for parties of eight players.

new_content.name: Cenote Ja Ja Gural
new_content.description: A treasure dungeon consisting of chambers sealed behind stone doors. Players must choose the correct door to proceed or face a trap that ejects them from the instance.
new_content.location: Access via treasure coffers from br'aaxskin treasure maps

new_content.name: The Neoteric Witch
new_content.description: A prerequisite quest required to unlock the AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage) raid.

new_content.name: Allagan tomestones of heliometry
new_content.description: A new currency introduced for level 100 players, capped at 450 per week with a maximum carry of 2,000.
new_content.npc_location: Zircon in Solution Nine (X:8.6 Y:13.5) for exchange; Theone in Solution Nine (X:8.6 Y:13.6) for enhancement

new_content.name: Data Center Travel and World Visit systems
new_content.description: Login caps for these systems have been updated to be tied to World classification (Standard, New, Preferred, Congested).

new_content.name: AAC Illustrated: LHW Edition
new_content.description: A token obtained from the AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage) raids that can be exchanged for gear.

housing.name: Alzadaal's Garden Lamp
housing.description: An outdoor lighting fixture of the same ancient Hannish design encountered in the remnants above Alzadaal's Legacy.

housing.name: Il Mheg Arbor
housing.description: The vibrant flowers of this elegant garden decoration put one in mind of the faeries' colorful homeland. Pixies thankfully not included.

housing.name: Hyperboreia Bench
housing.description: This circular bench imitates a design seen in Ktisis Hyperboreia, complete with planted vegetation.

housing.name: Pile of Gold
housing.description: Nothing screams affluence (and the fragility of one's ego) like an overflowing mountain of silver and gold. Whether it truly is as valuable as it looks will always depend on the market.

housing.name: Goblet Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a breathtaking view of the Goblet in all its splendor.

housing.name: Lavender Beds Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a picturesque cluster of hillside houses at the Lavender Beds.

housing.name: Mist Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the community of Mist and the stunning stretch of coastline it sits atop.

housing.name: Shirogane Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the vibrant rooves and tree-topped outcrops of Shirogane.

housing.name: Empyreum Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the ornate, pointed spires that punctuate the Empyreum skyline.

housing.name: Aitiascope Desk
housing.description: Simple, unadorned work desks such as this are used to make observations in the Aitiascope. Includes a monitor for keeping track of aetheric fluctuations.

housing.name: Aitiascope Lamp
housing.description: A softly glowing lamp of the kind used to provide illumination in the depths of the Aitiascope.

housing.name: Sake Barrel
housing.description: This barrel of sake is wrapped in a mat of woven rice straw. A specialty product of Hingashi.

housing.name: Decorative Hingan Door
housing.description: A window crafted to resemble a Hingan-style sliding door.

glamour.name: Scientist's Monocle
glamour.description: Head piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Coat
glamour.description: Body piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Gloves
glamour.description: Hands piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Breeches
glamour.description: Legs piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Scientist's Boots
glamour.description: Feet piece, Item Level: 1 / Equipment Level: 1

glamour.name: Ribboned Parasol
glamour.description: An understated parasol embellished with red ribbons.
